purpose: The user owns scope, sharing, corrections, retention, and cross-patient opt-in.
new_or_extended_components: Share Grants; Consent Scopes; Cross-Patient Opt-In Gate; Revocation Logs
evidence_refs: VISION.md; WellBe non-negotiables; Research F safety risks
guardrail: No institutional default analytics; every external view is user-scoped and revocable.

purpose: Capture raw context immutably, with provenance, before reasoning.
wellbe_v1_modules: M03 Raw Context Vault; M04 Processing Pipeline; M28 Ingestion Layer
new_or_extended_components: Patient-held record import; out-of-system care import; document/photo/SMS/manual provenance
evidence_refs: WellBe overview; Research F PI018; Research E product implications
guardrail: Raw data labeled by source, quality, date, and verification state.

purpose: Transform raw data into source-linked entities, facts, events, signals, and relationships.
new_or_extended_components: Evidence Traceability 2.0; Clinical/Event Type Ontology; Thread Evidence Links
evidence_refs: WellBe M09/M16/M26; Shared Health Memory FEAT005
guardrail: No orphan derived facts; every summary sentence can trace back to raw/user/clinical sources.

purpose: Represent unresolved or ongoing health concerns as longitudinal threads across symptoms, tests, visits, referrals, and patient story.
wellbe_v1_modules: M22 Concern Tracker; M10/M11/M12; timeline; graph-explorer
new_or_extended_components: Health Thread Engine; Thread State Machine; Unresolved Status; Thread Similarity/Linking
evidence_refs: Research F PI001/F001; Shared Health Memory Health Thread; Research B no-one-connected-dots
guardrail: Thread creation must show why signals were linked and allow user correction/unlinking.

purpose: Maintain story, clinical, pattern, decision, responsibility, and equity/access memories around each Health Thread.
new_or_extended_components: Story Memory; Clinical Memory; Pattern Memory; Decision Memory; Responsibility Memory; Equity & Access Memory
evidence_refs: Shared Health Memory six_memories.csv; Research F product principles
guardrail: Patient narrative and clinical facts are never merged without labels.

purpose: Track open loops after visits: pending results, referrals, unresolved symptoms, post-discharge instructions, deterioration, and repeat visits.
new_or_extended_components: Pending Item Ledger; Referral Lifecycle; Result Tracker; Post-Visit Plan Checker; Repeat-Visit View
guardrail: If clinical owner is unknown, say unknown; provide user action/support, not false assignment.

purpose: Help users ask better questions, see what changed, identify missing context, and prepare safe clinician conversations.
new_or_extended_components: Normal-Test Explainer; Missing Data Checklist; Thread Questions; Myth/Personal Theory Checker
evidence_refs: Research F PI006/PI010; WellBe Investigate Never Diagnose; Shared Health Memory interpretations
guardrail: Use 'discuss/track/ask' language; never 'you have' or 'doctor missed'.

purpose: Prevent diagnosis claims, panic language, unsafe instructions, bias amplification, alert overload, and privacy violations.
new_or_extended_components: Clinical Safety Case Log; Feature Risk Register; False Positive/Negative Review; Bias Controls
evidence_refs: Research F safety_risks; SHM risk_register; WellBe Safety
guardrail: Safety engine is rule-bound and cannot be bypassed by AI outputs.

purpose: Present memory as simple, layered interfaces: dashboard, Health Thread, visit prep, doctor packet, post-visit checks, mobile/bot logging.
new_or_extended_components: Health Thread Dashboard; Visit Packet; Pending Loop Inbox; Correction Review; Share Link/Export
evidence_refs: Research F doctor/patient workflows; VISION.md user-controlled sharing
guardrail: Default simple; complexity revealed on demand; no data shared unless user chooses.
